purpose: Phase implementation-group verdicts generated after grouped implementation batches. Use this as a bounded group-repair queue before the normal phase coverage gate.

repairPolicy.blockedMeans: explicit blocker/fallback decision exists; do not loop on this group before phase gate
repairPolicy.completeMeans: linked source/platform authority rows have enough behavior, parity, endpoint, and evidence data

groups.title: Architecture risk: broad target endpoints
reasons: app-build-gradle-kts-0a842e752f-004-screen-lifecycle-entry-point-initializat: implemented with behavior, parity, endpoint, and verification evidence
app-src-main-androidmanifest-xml-422b0d36ae-005-screen-lifecycle-entry-point-initializat: implemented with behavior, parity, endpoint, and verification evidence
app-src-main-res-values-themes-xml-1c5ca98798-001-android-resource-configuration-must-be-m: implemented with behavior, parity, endpoint, and verification evidence
requiredBehaviors: HarmonyOS replaces the Android splash-screen keep-on-screen lifecycle with EntryAbility startup plus module start-window metadata: EntryAbility resolves the persisted login flag before loading content, then opens the bootstrap page whose initial route state...
EntryAbility.onCreate and onWindowStageCreate replace the launcher-activity entry point, while main_pages.json binds startup to the FoodikeBootstrap page in the HarmonyOS shell.
HarmonyOS module metadata replaces the Android splash theme by referencing the start-window background color and icon media directly from module.json5 and copied icon resources.
acceptanceEvidence: Replace broad endpoints with precise target functions, types, resources, or tests before closing the group.
riskHints: current evidence uses broad shell/root/whole-file endpoints

groups.title: Platform capability: Lightweight key-value session persistence
reasons: preferences-key-value-persistence: platform capability has concrete target evidence
requiredBehaviors: LoginRepositoryImpl persists login state in Android DataStore preferences and SplashViewModel reads it to select onboarding versus home at startup.
Use HarmonyOS Preferences key-value storage for persisted login/session state and preserve startup route selection semantics.
Persist a boolean login flag across launches and resolve the initial route from that stored state before rendering the main shell.
acceptanceEvidence: Record targetCapabilitySearch, targetApiOrLibrary, targetStrategy, targetEndpoints, and tests or validation notes.
Direct platform status requires Cangjie-callable API, package, wrapper, FFI, or bridge evidence.
Fallback or deferred status requires a concrete blocker plus fallback/risk/future path.
Referenced tests need a latest PASS, focused manual/emulator evidence, or recorded harness blocker.

reasons: platform capability has concrete target evidence

groups.title: Platform capability: Startup route gating and main window lifecycle
reasons: startup-route-and-window-lifecycle: platform capability has concrete target evidence
requiredBehaviors: App startup is gated by splash/loading state and chooses onboarding or home before normal navigation shell rendering; activity/application/theme wiring participates in this behavior.
Map Android splash/startup behavior to HarmonyOS UIAbility and WindowStage startup flow while preserving delayed initial route selection and shell setup.
Do not show the main routed experience until persisted session state is resolved; then open onboarding or home with equivalent main-window content loading behavior.
acceptanceEvidence: Record targetCapabilitySearch, targetApiOrLibrary, targetStrategy, targetEndpoints, and tests or validation notes.
Direct platform status requires Cangjie-callable API, package, wrapper, FFI, or bridge evidence.
Fallback or deferred status requires a concrete blocker plus fallback/risk/future path.
Referenced tests need a latest PASS, focused manual/emulator evidence, or recorded harness blocker.

AndroidManifest.xml binds application icon, app label, bundle identity, startup theme, and launcher activity resources.
AndroidManifest.xml declares MainActivity as the exported launcher activity through the MAIN/LAUNCHER intent filter.
AndroidManifest.xml contains no uses-permission declarations or permission-specific activity/result wiring.
The manifest-launcher MainActivity serves as the app entry point and hosts splash-driven startup initialization.

themes.xml contains only theme resource values and no runtime-permission behavior.

requiredBehaviors: Source app/build.gradle.kts configures an Android application/activity app with Compose, Hilt, and splash dependencies that feed the Android lifecycle entry path.

Source Gradle config enables Compose, Navigation Compose, and accompanist dependencies that support the app route shell with onboarding, login, home, history, cart, profile, and restaurant-detail destinations plus bottom-bar/cart commands.
Source app/build.gradle.kts contains no dependency or plugin wiring for a real runtime-permission flow beyond standard Android application setup.
MainActivity installs the Android splash screen, keeps it visible while SplashViewModel resolves the persisted login flag, then composes navigation with the resolved start destination.
Source DataStore preferences wiring backs a persisted boolean login flag that startup/login/profile flows read and toggle.

Preserve base strings, placeholders, plurals/arrays when user-visible, and source locale coverage or documented product-level locale reduction.
